---
title: "模型摘要"
author: "Anthony Sung"
date: today
lang: zh-TW
reference-section-title: "參考文獻"
crossref:
  def-title: 定義
  lem-title: 引理
  thm-title: 定理
  prp-title: 命題
  cor-title: 推論
format:
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      - preamble.tex
    output-file: main.pdf
---

{{< include sections/01_intro.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/02_literature.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/03_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/04_equilibria.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/05_timing.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/06_welfare.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/07_conclusion.qmd >}}
